summary: Frontend-only Bikemates app tested end-to-end. All 4 core flows (Rent Bike, Book Ride, List Bike, Share Ride) work correctly. Data persists via localStorage; wallet decreases on rentals/rides and increases on wallet-add; My Bookings/My Bikes/My Rides all reflect new entries; shared ride appears in Book Ride list with 'Your ride' marker; Reset demo works. No console/page errors detected.
action_items: Minor testid naming discrepancy with request doc: actual code uses labels-to-kebab derivation, e.g. sidebar-my-bookings, sidebar-list-bike-for-rent, sidebar-list-route-share-ride, quick-rent-a-bike, quick-book-a-ride, quick-list-bike-for-rent, quick-share-a-ride, and ride-fuelsplit (not ride-fuel/ride-price). Consider adding stable aliases (sidebar-bookings, sidebar-list-bike, sidebar-share-ride, quick-rent-bike, quick-book-ride, quick-list-bike, quick-share-ride) if downstream tests rely on the request-doc names.
critical_code_review_comments: AppLayout/Dashboard derive data-testid from human labels via regex; if labels change, testids silently change. Prefer explicit stable testids.
ShareRide submit does not validate required fields (from/to/fuelSplit/vehicle) — an empty ride can be posted. Add minimum validation.
ListBike.jsx and other pages: consider input validations (numeric fields, non-empty name/college) before submit.
test_credentials: Mock auth accepts any email/password. Used student@college.edu / test1234.
seed_data_creation: Used Reset demo to clean state; created TEST Yamaha R15 bike listing and TEST Campus A -> TEST Downtown ride during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All app pages under /app/* and /dashboard are reachable without auth guard. Sidebar & quick-action data-testids follow the label-derived pattern (see action_items). Reset demo (Settings > reset-demo) clears localStorage seed. QR uses api.qrserver.com; OTP is 4-digit random. Wallet starts at ₹1,240.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found. All 4 core flows validated: Rent Bike (₹1240→₹980 after daily plan, OTP+QR shown, appears in My Bookings), Book Ride (seat confirmed, wallet debited), List Bike (form submits, nav to /app/my-bikes, new bike visible), Share Ride (submit navs to /app/my-rides, new ride visible in Book Ride list as 'Your ride'). Wallet add ₹500 updates balance and adds transaction. Messages send appends. Reset demo restores initial state (₹1,240).
